title: RabbitMQ 4.3 Delayed Retries, Priorities, and Consumer Timeouts · Type Recall
summary: A delayed handoff reconstructs rabbitmq 4.3 delayed retries, priorities, and consumer timeouts from bounded publish, route, delivery, acknowledgement, and recovery evidence, challenges one misconception, and revises the RabbitMQ 4.3 feature and fallback compatibility plan. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for RabbitMQ 4.3 feature and fallback compatibility plan after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debuggin…
objectives: Use RabbitMQ 4.3 quorum delayed-retry policies for returned or failed deliveries with explicit delay, eligibility, attempt, and compatibility evidence.
Compare native delayed retries with TTL and DLX cycles by rewrite cost, loss and duplicate windows, head-of-line effects, topology, and version support.
Use RabbitMQ 4.3 quorum 32 strict priority levels with bounded use, starvation evidence, prefetch interaction, and per-priority monitoring.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Separate evidence from confidence · Review Feature Version Gate
steps.instruction:
review case — A review messaging team handles case 9375 in a consumer fleet under a shared dependency outage. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to gate RabbitMQ 4.3 quorum retry, priority, and timeout behavior on version and valid budgets; preserve one tenant fairness invariant; then raise a broker resource alarm and stop new publisher admission. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Gate 4.3-only behavior on deployed broker, queue type, policy support, client behavior, migration state, and tested fallback.

Inspect the Feature Version Gate trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Separate evidence from confidence · Review Feature Version Gate.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for gate 4.3-only behavior on deployed broker, queue type, policy support, client behavior, migration state, and tested fallback. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Separate evidence from confidence · Review Feature Version Gate, keep Feature Version Gate connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.
